instruction: The London release setup needs a cleanup pass. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, repair the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.
canonical_instruction: I need the London release setup cleaned up. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, refresh the handoff file, and leave the sync and next step correctly set.
instruction_variants: Something's off in the London release setup. Review the next-step task on the board and the sync on the calendar, fix the stale next step, update the handoff file, and leave the next step and sync correctly set.

solution_commands: file create --path '/ops/release-handoff.txt' --content 'London refreshed release handoff notes.'
